# Azion Docs — get-started

> All pages of the get-started section. Root index: https://www.azion.com/en/llms.txt

- [Get started with Azion](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/): Start here: deploy your first application on Azion in minutes using a template, a GitHub repository, or the Azion CLI, and find the right path for your goal.
- [First deploy in 5 minutes](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/first-deploy/): Deploy your first application on Azion using a template, a GitHub repository, or the Azion CLI, and verify it's live with an HTTP 200 response on your Azion domain.
- [Hosting an Edge Site](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/first-deploy/cli/): Azion's Edge Computing platform has serverless functions that enable Edge Websites to be created and all processing done directly on our Edge Nodes, without having to access any origin infrastructure.
- [How to manage the Azion GitHub App](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/first-deploy/github/azion-github-app/): This documentation explains how the Azion GitHub App works and how to manage it according to your preferences.
- [Import & Deploy a Project from GitHub](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/first-deploy/github/import-an-existing-project-from-github/): This documentation assists you in importing your own GitHub repository to build and deploy an application on Azion's edge.
- [Use a template via Azion Console](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/first-deploy/template/): Simplify and optimize your workflow with templates on Azion Console. Enhance productivity and make operations effortlessly, saving time with existing templates.
- [How to build with Angular](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/angular/): Learn to initialize and deploy your Angular project on the Azion Web Platform using Functions, enhancing your web development capabilities.
- [How to build with Astro](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/astro/): Learn how to initialize and deploy an Astro project on the Azion platform using Functions, featuring guides on setting up with the Azion CLI and managing deployments.
- [Develop with Azion CLI](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/cli/): Azion's CLI (command-line interface) is an open source tool that enables the management of services offered by Azion.
- [Functions Code Editor Overview](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/code-editor/): The code editor for Functions is a good fit to get started developing at the edge.
- [How to build with Docusaurus](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/docusaurus/): Learn how to initialize and deploy an Docusaurus project on the Azion platform using Functions, featuring guides on setting up with the Azion CLI and managing deployments.
- [How to build with Eleventy](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/eleventy/): Learn how to initialize and deploy an Eleventy project on the Azion platform using Functions, featuring guides on setting up with the Azion CLI and managing deployments.
- [Build with Environment Variables](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/environment-variables/): Explore how Environment Variables enhance security and flexibility in software development using Functions through the Azion API.
- [How to build with Gatsby](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/gatsby/): Learn how to initialize and deploy an Gatsby project on the Azion platform using Functions, featuring guides on setting up with the Azion CLI and managing deployments.
- [Build with Azion Go SDK](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/go/): The Azion SDK for Go facilitates the use of the Azion APIs by providing a set of tools that make the development of Go applications smoother.
- [How to build with Hexo](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/hexo/): Learn to deploy a Hexo project using the Azion CLI to the Edge Platform, covering setup, local development, and Functions integration.
- [How to build with Hono](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/hono/): Learn how to initialize and deploy an Hono project on the Azion platform using Functions, featuring guides on setting up with the Azion CLI and managing deployments.
- [How to build with Hugo](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/hugo/): Learn how to initialize and deploy an Hugo project on the Azion platform using Functions, featuring guides on setting up with the Azion CLI and managing deployments.
- [How to build functions](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/javascript/): Explore how to develop and debug serverless Functions using JavaScript on the Azion Runtime, enhancing your Applications.
- [How to build with Jekyll](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/jekyll/): Learn how to initialize and deploy an Jekyll project on the Azion platform using Functions, featuring guides on setting up with the Azion CLI and managing deployments.
- [Local development](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/local-dev/): Explore how Azion CLI enhances local development for Applications with efficient debugging, accelerated workflows, and collaborative features.
- [How to build with Next.js](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/next/): Learn how to initialize and deploy a Next.js project on the Azion Edge Platform, leveraging Functions and the latest Node.js features.
- [How to build with Nextal](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/nextal/): Learn how to initialize and deploy a Nextal project on the Azion Web Platform using the OpenNextJS preset and Azion CLI, combining Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
- [Develop with Azion Overview](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/overview/): Explore the revolution of Jamstack architecture with Edge Computing, using tools like Azion Bundler and Azion CLI for efficient web app development on the Azion platform.
- [How to build with React](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/react/): Learn how to deploy a React project using Azion CLI, optimize it for the Edge, and utilize Functions, with a complete guide on setting up and deploying on the Azion platform.
- [Build with Azion Runtime](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/runtime-apis/): Check out the documentation for the JavaScript Runtime Environment on Azion Edge Platform.
- [How to build with Svelte](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/svelte/): Learn how to initialize and deploy an Svelte project on the Azion platform using Functions, featuring guides on setting up with the Azion CLI and managing deployments.
- [Build with Azion Terraform Provider](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/terraform-provider/): Explore the Azion Terraform Provider, an open source tool for managing infrastructures on the Azion platform with Terraform, using the Azion SDK for efficient integration.
- [How to build with VitePress](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/vite/): Learn how to initialize and deploy a VitePress project on the Azion Web Platform using Functions and the Azion CLI, enhancing your frontend development skills.
- [How to build with Vue](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/vue/): Explore Vue.js for building seamless web interfaces with a guide on initializing and deploying your project using Azion Functions and Platform.
- [How to build with WebAssembly](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/frameworks/wasm/): Explore how to create Functions using JavaScript and WebAssembly on Azion, including guide on wasmCode implementation for Edge Computing.
- [Build an application](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/journeys/launch/): Explore how to deploy and configure your Applications with Azion's comprehensive tools, enhancing security, automation, and performance.
- [Secure an application](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/journeys/protect/): Use Firewall to secure your applications.
- [Secure DNS](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/journeys/protect/dns/): Discover how to use Azion Secure products for your DNS. Strengthen your online security with robust DNS protection for your digital assets with Edge DNS.
- [Secure an infrastructure](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/journeys/protect/infrastructure/): Use Origin Shield to secure your infrastructure.
- [How to migrate your application to Azion](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/migrate/): Learn how you can bring your applications and infrastructure to Azion.
- [Migrate from Akamai to Azion | Full Guide](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/migrate/akamai/): Learn how to migrate from Akamai to Azion with less operational risk. Migrate Akamai Ion, App & API Protector, EdgeWorkers, EdgeKV, Cloudlets, Edge DNS, Global Traffic Management, NetStorage, DataStream, mPulse, Prolexic, and related delivery, compute, security, storage, DNS, and observability workflows to Azion Applications, Functions, KV Store, Object Storage, Firewall, Edge DNS, Load Balancer, Data Stream, Edge Pulse, Real-Time Events, and Real-Time Metrics.
- [Migrate from AWS to Azion | Full Guide](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/migrate/aws/): Learn how to migrate from AWS to Azion with less operational risk. Migrate CloudFront, Lambda, S3, DynamoDB, Route 53, WAF, and other AWS services to Azion Applications, Functions, Object Storage, KV Store, Edge DNS, and security products. Azion provides a complete migration path from AWS compute, storage, database, security, and observability services to a unified edge platform.
- [Migrate from Cloudflare to Azion | Full Guide](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/migrate/cloudflare/): Learn how to migrate from Cloudflare to Azion with less operational risk. Preserve domains, redirects, environment variables, Functions, KV data, Object Storage, SQL Database, security rules, and observability workflows. Azion provides a complete migration path from Cloudflare Pages, Workers, Workers KV, R2, D1, and configuration features to Azion Applications, Functions, KV Store, Object Storage, and SQL Database. The platform combines build, compute, storage, security, and observability in a unified environment designed for globally distributed applications.
- [Migrate from Fastly to Azion | Full Guide](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/migrate/fastly/): Learn how to migrate from Fastly to Azion with less operational risk. Migrate Fastly Full-Site Delivery, Compute, Edge Data Storage, Object Storage, Image Optimizer, WAF, DDoS protection, bot controls, TLS, logging, and observability workflows to Azion Applications, Functions, KV Store, Object Storage, Image Processor, Firewall, Certificate Manager, Data Stream, Real-Time Events, and Real-Time Metrics.
- [Migrate from Vercel to Azion | Complete migration guide for modern applications](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/migrate/vercel/): Learn how to migrate from Vercel to Azion with less operational risk. Migrate Vercel projects, production deployments, preview deployments, CDN configuration, Functions, Fluid Compute, AI integrations, Blob, Edge Config, Firewall, WAF, bot controls, domains, DNS, analytics, and observability workflows to Azion Applications, Functions, AI Inference, Object Storage, KV Store, Firewall, Web Application Firewall, Edge DNS, Certificate Manager, Real-Time Metrics, Real-Time Events, Data Stream, and Edge Pulse.
- [Go live with Azion](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/production-checklist/): This documentation will guide you to add a custom domain and point your traffic to Azion's network.
- [Start with a template](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/get-started/start-with-a-template/): This documentation will assist you to build a new application on Azion using templates.
